francophone.excerpt: Emmanuel Macron a salué l'extradition de Hicham Harb et a remercié les autorités palestiniennes.

francophone.excerpt: Le "principe est d’avoir une initiative à l’école qui puisse avoir des répercussions dans la vie familiale après", a défendu Édouard Geffray, jeudi, à France Inter.

anglophone.title: A jury declared Live Nation a monopoly. But ticket prices won't drop just yet
anglophone.excerpt: D.C. and 33 states now have to argue in favor of specific remedies and fines, which could be paused if Live Nation appeals. Experts say the long-term impact on ticket prices isn't clear either.

anglophone.title: Israeli and Palestinian activists share a vision for peace in Gaza

anglophone.title: Naples bank robbers hold 25 people hostage then vanish through tunnel

anglophone.title: Commission of Fine Arts votes to move ahead with Trump's proposed victory arch
anglophone.excerpt: The seven-member body, whose ranks are composed of Trump appointees, was expected to approve the arch. The proposed monument strongly resembles Paris' Arc de Triomphe, but almost 100 feet taller.

anglophone.title: Turkish police detain 162 people over online posts about school shootings

anglophone.title: NPR receives $113 million in charitable gifts
